machete.desc: A wide blade, well-balanced. Good for cutting through dense undergrowth.

lantern.desc: An oil lantern with a wire handle. It throws good light.

climbing_gear.desc: Rope, hooks, and a worn harness. It is enough to climb the cliff.

raft.desc: Logs lashed together with rope. Unwieldy, but it will float.

spear.desc: A sharpened pole tipped with chipped stone. Crude, but combat-ready.

axe.desc: A rough hand axe with a stone head. Good for chopping and defense.

knife.desc: A small stone knife with a wrapped wood handle. Light and quick.

note.desc: A folded note with quick instructions and a warning.

old_map.desc: A hand-drawn map on oilskin. The ink has held.

food.desc: Berries, bark, whatever you can find.

old_map_text: Drawn in rough strokes on oilskin. Hard to read in the dark.
A cabin is marked to the north, past thick trees.
A word is crossed out beneath it. You can make out: DO NOT STAY.
The river runs wide. An X marks something on the far bank.
Below the X: one word. SUPPLIES.
In the top corner, a lighthouse is drawn on high ground.
A line runs from the lighthouse down to the cliff face.
intro_text: You wake in a cold clearing with a pounding head.
Objective: reach the lighthouse top and signal SOS.
Hint: type help to see commands, and read note for your starting guidance.
note_text: Reach the lighthouse on high ground.
- Use go north/south/east/west or arrow keys to move.
- Use look and examine <feature> to find clues.
- Use take <item>, read <item>, and use <item> to progress.
Take the machete in the clearing.
Go north, enter the cabin, and take the lantern with oil, the bundled raft, and climbing gear.
Use climbing gear at the cliff route to reach the lighthouse.
Climb to the top and signal SOS.

rooms.name: Forest Clearing
rooms.description:
You stand in a wide clearing. Pale light filters through the canopy overhead. The forest grows thick to the north. You can hear branches snapping in there. A trail runs south toward the sound of running water. To the east the trees thin, then darken strangely around a hillside. Grey cliffs rise to the west through the treeline.

A machete is buried in a stump near the centre. A folded note is pinned beneath the grip.
rooms.description_with_lantern: Your lantern pushes the dark back. The clearing feels smaller in the light. The trail south is easier to read now, with fresh boot prints in the mud.

features.label: S
features.desc: An old stump, chest high. A machete is buried blade-first in the top.
features.examine_clue: The blade is well-balanced. The grip is wrapped in cord. A folded note is pinned beneath it. Take both items.

features.label: F
features.desc: A ring of stones with cold ash inside. Someone camped here recently.
features.examine_clue: Under the ash: a scrap of cloth with a crude arrow pointing north. Something is up there.

features.label: T
features.desc: A broken branch tied to a trunk with cord. It points south toward the river.
features.examine_clue: The cord is fresh. Someone marked this trail within the last day. They went south.

rooms.name: Thick Forest
rooms.description: You push through the last of the brambles into dense forest. The canopy closes out the sky. A dark cabin sits between two ancient oaks, its door hanging open. Someone lived here once, or tried to.
rooms.description_with_lantern: Lantern light cuts through the thicket. Through the open cabin doorway you can make out a bundled raft and supplies inside.

requires.message: Dense brambles tear at you. You need a machete to cut through.

features.label: C
features.desc: A rough timber cabin, door hanging open. The inside is dim but dry. Gear is stacked against the back wall.
features.examine_clue: You look around inside and spot a lantern with oil and a bundled raft. It looks usable.

features.label: L
features.desc: A massive fallen oak. You had to climb over it to get here.
features.examine_clue: Old axe marks on the stump. This tree was cut down, not blown over. Someone wanted this path blocked.

rooms.name: Riverbank
rooms.description: The path ends at a wide dark river. The current runs fast and cold, and you can feel the spray from here. A rope post on the near bank suggests someone once ran a crossing. The rope is long gone.
rooms.description_with_raft: You are carrying the raft. You can push south into the lake channel or follow the river current west toward sea cliffs.

features.label: P
features.desc: A thick post driven into the bank. Frayed rope is knotted at the top, cut clean on the far side long ago.
features.examine_clue: The fraying was cut from the far side. Someone didn't want you to follow.

features.label: R
features.desc: A flat rock jutting into the river. Good place to launch from.
features.examine_clue: Drag marks on the surface. Someone launched a raft from this exact spot before.

rooms.name: River Run
rooms.description: You enter a fast river run between cut banks and slick stone. The current drives west toward salt spray and open water.
rooms.description_with_raft: The raft rides the current cleanly here. East returns to the riverbank launch, west pushes toward the bay mouth.

requires.message: The river run is too strong to enter on foot. You need the raft.

features.label: R
features.desc: A slick shelf of river stone where the water surges past.
features.examine_clue: Scored grooves show repeated raft launches and hard landings.

rooms.name: River Lake
rooms.description: The river widens into a wind-cut lake beneath the cave ridge. Dark water rolls west toward the bay. A narrow channel hugs the north bank toward the cave side.
rooms.description_with_raft: The raft rides low as you pole through the channel. You can track north toward the riverbank, push south toward the far shore, or ride west where the lake spills into the bay.

features.label: H
features.desc: A narrow channel threads between reeds and shallow bars.
features.examine_clue: The water here is calmer. You can steer north to the riverbank or south toward deeper water.

features.label: J
features.desc: Broken rock teeth rise just under the surface where the lake meets the bay pull.
features.examine_clue: Sharp ridges below the waterline. Keep the raft clear of this section.

rooms.name: Cave
rooms.description: A cave mouth opens in the hillside. The dark inside is absolute, a black you could touch. You can smell cold stone and old smoke.
rooms.description_with_lantern: The lantern fills the cave with shifting light. Faded paint marks spread across one wall, and a flat stone sits near the back.

requires.message: The cave is pitch black. You need a lantern to enter safely.

features.label: X
features.desc: A flat stone sits below a faded cave painting scratched into the wall. An oilskin map is tucked into a crack beneath it.
features.examine_clue: In the lantern light you make out a painted tiger and a rough arrow pointing west toward higher ground. The oilskin map marks the lighthouse route.

features.label: U
features.desc: A narrow tunnel opens behind a curtain of hanging roots in the center of the cave.
features.examine_clue: Cold air moves through the tunnel. It leads into a deeper chamber.

rooms.name: Cabin Interior
rooms.description: You step fully inside the cabin. Dust hangs in the air and old boards creak under your boots. A lit-ready lantern hangs by the door, a bundled raft rests near the bunk, and climbing gear is coiled beside the worktable.

features.label: L
features.desc: A narrow ladder leads to a cramped loft above the rafters.
features.examine_clue: From the top rung you can see the forest canopy through gaps in the roof planks.

features.label: B
features.desc: A rough bunk with an old wool blanket and a cracked wooden frame.
features.examine_clue: Whoever slept here left in a hurry. Mud is still dried across the floorboards.

features.label: T
features.desc: A scarred table covered with nails, twine, and a stub of candle.
features.examine_clue: Map scraps and rope cuts suggest someone prepared for a fast climb to the cliff.

rooms.name: Cave Chamber
rooms.description: You squeeze through the tunnel into a deeper cave chamber where the ceiling opens high overhead. The stone walls glisten with damp, and your footsteps echo back at you.

features.label: C
features.desc: A smooth stone column rises from floor to ceiling near the center of the chamber.
features.examine_clue: Drip marks carve pale lines down the rock. Water has flowed here for years.

features.label: O
features.desc: A shallow pool mirrors the lantern light in broken ripples.
features.examine_clue: The water is clear and cold. Tiny white fish dart away from your shadow.

features.label: G
features.desc: A narrow ledge circles part of the wall beneath the cave roof.
features.examine_clue: Wind-shaped soot marks this ledge. Whoever camped here stripped the useful gear and moved on.

rooms.name: Far Shore
rooms.description: The far bank. Dense reeds and dark mud. Something is half-buried in the silt, but you cannot make it out in the dark. You will need to come back better prepared.

requires.message: The river is too fast and wide to cross. You need a raft.

rooms.name: Mountain Pass
rooms.description: You climb onto a broad cliff shelf of weathered grey stone. Sea spray hangs in the air. The lighthouse rises from a narrow crown of rock with water on three sides, white tower cut against the dark sky. Its heavy door stands half open.

requires.message: The cliff is sheer. You need climbing gear to ascend.

features.label: H
features.desc: A weather-beaten lighthouse rises from the cliff top. Salt and wind have scarred the white paint.
features.examine_clue: The lantern room still has dry fuel and a striker. This is the signal point the note described.

features.label: E
features.desc: The cliff edge drops to dark water. Waves crash into the bay below.
features.examine_clue: The river mouth bends into the bay here, then empties into the open ocean.

features.label: P
features.desc: A saltwater pool trapped in the rock reflects the lighthouse beam housing above.
features.examine_clue: Broken shell and wet rope fibers. Rescue crews used this ledge before.

rooms.name: Lighthouse Interior
rooms.description: You step into the lighthouse and pull the door shut against the wind. Damp stone walls rise in a tall cylinder around you. A spiral iron stair circles upward toward the lantern room, with old equipment bolted to the lower walls.

features.label: S
features.desc: Narrow iron stairs curl around the wall toward the lantern room.
features.examine_clue: The top platform holds the signal lens and brazier. One more climb and you can send a distress signal.

features.label: W
features.desc: A narrow window slit looks out over black water and white spray.
features.examine_clue: From here you can see surf wrapping around the base of the tower.

features.label: K
features.desc: A steel locker is fixed to the wall beside old maintenance notes.
features.examine_clue: Inside: spare wick rope and lens cloth, all dry and ready for signal duty.

features.label: C
features.desc: A rusted console links to shutters and vent chains higher in the tower.
features.examine_clue: The mechanisms still move. Whoever left this place kept it ready for one last emergency.

rooms.name: Lantern Room
rooms.description: You emerge into a wide lantern room ringed by thick glass panes. Rain spatters the windows while waves break far below. A cold brazier sits beneath the giant lens, and the shutter controls are still connected.
rooms.description_with_lantern: Lantern light glints off brass gears and glass. Every part of the beacon is visible now: the brazier, lens track, shutter crank, and the signal lever beside the catwalk hatch.

features.label: L
features.desc: The lighthouse lens towers over you, polished and waiting.
features.examine_clue: With the fire lit, this lens will throw a bright SOS beam across the bay and out to sea.

features.label: B
features.desc: A wide brass brazier packed with dry fuel and wick rope.
features.examine_clue: Everything is ready. Light it and signal three long, three short, three long flashes: SOS.

features.label: C
features.desc: A heavy crank wheel opens and closes the lens shutters.
features.examine_clue: The wheel turns smoothly enough for a coded signal pattern.

features.label: V
features.desc: A brass lever controls the rotating lens carriage.
features.examine_clue: Set to free-rotate and the beam will sweep the bay once the brazier is lit.

features.label: R
features.desc: A hatch opens to a narrow outer catwalk circling the lantern glass.
features.examine_clue: Outside, black water surrounds the rock below the tower. Any ship offshore would see your signal.
